headline: NVIDIA and Global Robotics Leaders Take Physical AI to the Real World
summary: NVIDIA and Global Robotics Leaders NVIDIA is partnering with the global robotics ecosystem — including leading robot brain developers, industrial robot giants and humanoid pioneers — to power production-scale physical AI. Image Credit: ABB Robotics (Top Left), Humanoid (Top Right), Skild AI(Bottom Left), Universal Robots (Bottom Right) News Summary: Physical AI leaders across robot brain developers, industrial, and surgical robot giants and humanoid pioneers including ABB Robotics, AGIBOT, Agili

headline: NVIDIA Rises as CEO Jensen Huang Takes the Stage at GTC Event
summary: NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) stock rallied as much as 4% today, with shares touching $188 before pulling back but still closing firmly in the green. The move came as CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at the company’s annual GTC developer conference in San Jose, California. GTC runs March 16 through 19, and Huang’s keynote has historically been ... NVIDIA Rises as CEO Jensen Huang Takes the Stage at GTC Event

headline: Vicarious Surgical applies for Nasdaq listing
summary: The robotics company reduced its 2026 cash burn forecast and said its development timeline remains on track, with a system design freeze expected by year-end.

headline: Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT): A Dependable Dividend Stock with Strong Fundamentals
